modal.title: Checkout
modal.sslNote: Pages use HTTPS with trusted SSL; we only store the result, not your card details.

messages.cartSaved: Your cart has been saved. We'll notify you when shipping becomes available to your region.
messages.completeShipping: Please complete your shipping address and contact details so we can confirm shipping to your region before continuing.
messages.selectPaypalCountry: Please select a country/region we can ship to before continuing to PayPal.
messages.orderFailed: Order submission failed, please try again

card.title: Credit / Debit cards
card.subtitle: Secure card page
card.description: Card details are entered on a secure payment page from our provider; we only store your order result.
card.stepperDescription: Enter full shipping info and contact number here, then we redirect you to the PCI-compliant card page. We never store your card number or CVC.

points.shipping: Required: full shipping info + contact number
points.immediate: Use when you want to pay immediately with Visa / Mastercard.

paypal.title: Pay with PayPal
paypal.subtitle: Express checkout
paypal.description: You will be redirected to PayPal. We never see or store your PayPal login or card information.
paypal.stepperDescription: We rely on the shipping address saved in your PayPal account whenever possible. Choose a supported country first so we can confirm fulfillment.

points.country: Required: select a shippable country before continuing.

alipay.title: Alipay / WeChat / UnionPay
alipay.subtitle: Local wallets
alipay.description: You approve the payment in your local wallet. We still collect shipping info here to prepare dispatch.
alipay.stepperDescription: Approve payment inside your usual wallet. We still gather shipping details in this tab to prepare dispatch and confirm customs information.

points.wallets: Great for China-mainland wallets and UnionPay.

stripe.title: Pay with Stripe
stripe.subtitle: 3D Secure ready
stripe.description: Stripe handles your card details and any extra verification. We only store the payment status.
stripe.stepperDescription: Stripe handles card input and any extra verification. We keep the form minimal here and let Stripe manage the sensitive fields.

points.sca: Great for customers that require SCA/3DS.

bank.title: Bank transfer
bank.subtitle: Manual invoice
bank.description: Place the order first, then send a bank transfer using the reference we show you on the next step.
bank.stepperDescription: Place the order, then transfer the funds using the bank instructions shown on the next step. Remember to include your order number as reference.

points.reference: Include your order number as payment reference.

worldfirst.title: WorldFirst
worldfirst.subtitle: Cross-border
worldfirst.description: Send funds to a local WorldFirst account in your currency. We never access your banking credentials.
worldfirst.stepperDescription: Ideal for international or business orders. You pay into a regional WorldFirst account in your currency; they settle the converted funds to us.

payment.tapCardHint: Tap a card to view details

shipping.addressHelp: If shipping to your area isn't available yet, it doesn't always mean we can't deliver. Contact us and we'll check options for you.
shipping.optionsIntro: Don’t worry, we have options for you:
shipping.contactSpecialShipping: Contact us for special shipping arrangements
shipping.saveCartLater: Save cart and check back later
shipping.notRequiredForMethod: Shipping details are not required for this method.

review.earnPointsHint: Earn points on your next order and apply them here for instant discounts.
review.orderNotesPlaceholder: Add any delivery instructions or special requests…

summary.empty: Order details will appear here once items are in your cart.
